description.en:
Spring descends, a hundred blooms ascend
Clumps here, blossoms there,
blooming in full, true beauty.
description.zh-TW:
春天到，百花開，
紅薔薇，白茉莉。
這屏幾欉，彼屏幾蕊，
開得真齊，真正美。

description.en:
Aiming for a top school,
but not my true passion.
description.zh-TW:
以考取頂尖學校為目標
但科系並非自己最喜歡的

regretText.en:
Why must I reach the “top”?
I have no passion for these fields.
As long as I can do what I love, 
Does it matter,
even without a “future”?
regretText.zh-TW:
為什麼一定要走到頂尖？
我對這些領域完全沒有熱情
人生只要能做自己喜歡的事情
就算不受重視、沒有未來發展
也無關緊要吧？

title.en: Stay in my lifelong comfort zone
title.zh-TW: 停留在從小到大的舒適圈

description.en:
Chase my passion,
even if everyone overlooks it.
description.zh-TW:
以考取自己最喜歡的科系為目標
但這些領域的未來不受社會重視

regretText.en:
When passion becomes a tool for profit, will its essence change?
Choosing a stable path might actually offer more freedom to keep my love alive.
regretText.zh-TW:
當自己喜歡的事情變成賺錢的工具
熱愛的本質是否會因此變質？
如果唸更有未來發展的熱門科系
也還是能繼續做我喜歡的事情
留在舒適圈其實會更自在更自由

question.en:
As I grow older,
I find myself standing at the edge of choice
,where paths diverge into unseen futures.
In a world that shifts, cruel and unyielding—I wonder which road is mine to take.
Yet, whichever way I turn,
that so-called “first choice” lingers—a quiet captor, binding me in expectations not my own.
question.zh-TW:
隨著年紀慢慢成長，
我也要開始選擇未來的科系了。
在這個變遷殘酷的社會裡，
究竟什麼才是最好的選擇？
但不管選擇走哪條路，
「第一志願」好像默默地在綁架我...

description.en:
June jasmine scents the hills.
A girl alone in her room.
Blooms wait to be picked.
No one knows her heart.
June jasmine scents the hills,
 A girl sits lonely in her room.
 The blossoms have opened wide, Ready for the harvest—
 Yet, who will notice a girl in her prime?
description.zh-TW:
六月茉莉滿山香，
單身娘仔守空房，
好花開透人來採，
娘仔十八誰人知。

description.en:
Stay by my lover’s side,
to build a future for the family.
description.zh-TW:
不和愛人分開、留在臺灣
為未來的婚姻與家庭扎根

regretText.en:
Is this all my life will ever be?
Going abroad is a rare chance.
I want to see a different world.
My dreams are right there.
My loved ones will support me.
regretText.zh-TW:
人生就只能是這樣了嗎？
好不容易能去留學...
好想去看看不一樣的世界
夢想就在那裡...
愛我的人們，會支持我的

title.zh-TW: 停留在家鄉、留在愛人身邊

description.en:
Study abroad, master true passion,
and keep chasing my dreams.
description.zh-TW:
出國留學、研讀自己最愛的領域
繼續追尋夢想

regretText.en:
Was it selfish to just leave?
Studying abroad is so expensive.
All I’ve learned seems useless now.
Are dreams really this important? Those I love...they need me.
regretText.zh-TW:
一走了之的我好自私、不夠理性...
留學好花錢...好想家...
學那麼多，好像也沒有用...
夢想有這麼重要嗎...
我愛的人，他們需要我

title.zh-TW: 走向夢想和遙遠茫茫的遠方

question.en:
After graduation,
I have the knowledge and skills from years of study,
the diligence and passion of youth. Yet, facing a blank future,
everything  holding  in my hands seems like nothing at all.
I search, almost urgently, for something to lean on—
something steady enough to claim as my own,
so that, in this vast and shifting world,
I might eventually  find a place to stand.
question.zh-TW:
大學畢業後，
我擁有學習多年的知識和能力、
年輕人的勤奮和熱血。
但面對空白的未來，
我手中握住的似乎什麼都不是，
需要趕快找到可以依靠的事物，
才能在這個世界找到立足點...

description.en:
Flower in a rainy night,
Fallen in the wind and rain.
No one sees the daily sorrow
Unseen, they sigh through endless days and nights;
Blown down by the storm.
Fallen to dust, they are lost forever.
description.zh-TW:
雨夜花雨夜花，
受風雨吹落地，
無人看見暝日怨嗟，
花謝落土不再回。

description.en:
Hide the truth,
and cherish our last happy days.
description.zh-TW:
對愛人隱瞞病情
度過最後一段幸福的生活

regretText.en:
At the end of life,
Why must they lose the right to decide for themselves?
They deserve to know the truth.
Though facing death and parting is heartbreaking, we will cherish our final moments even more.
regretText.zh-TW:
為什麼來到生命的盡頭
愛人卻失去了為自己做決定的機會？
他也該有知道真相的權利
雖然面對死亡和離別很傷感
但我們都會更珍惜最後的這段時光

title.en: Stay in the peace of a normal life
title.zh-TW: 停留在正常的平靜生活

description.en:
Tell them the truth.
Face the end and fear together.
description.zh-TW:
告訴愛人病情真相
每天練習面對生離死別和不安

regretText.en:
Truth is a blade, while a white lie is a lingering embrace.
 Before a destiny that draws near and will not turn,
 Is facing reality an act of honesty,
 Or merely another form of torment?
 On this final journey,
 let him live in the light of a carefree joy.
regretText.zh-TW:
真相是殘酷的，善意的謊言是不捨
在步步逼近且無法改變的命運前
面對現實究竟是誠實
還是另一種折磨？
最後的路程讓他無憂慮地快樂生活吧

title.zh-TW: 走向一定會到來的結局

question.en:
Noticing their weakening health,
I took them for regular check-ups.
One day, just like any other visit,
The doctor spoke to me alone.
I was told the condition is
worsening rapidly…
They are leaving me soon.
question.zh-TW:
因為發現愛人的身體抵抗力變差
所以我一直有定期帶他去醫院做檢查
有一天，我和往常一樣陪他去回診
看完診後，醫生卻單獨把我叫進診間
告訴我愛人病情急速惡化
在不久後即將離世...

question.en:
Back in my hometown,
They’ve grown so frail and thin.
I took them for a check-up.
The doctor spoke to me alone.
I was told the condition is
worsening rapidly…
They are leaving me soon.
question.zh-TW:
回到家鄉後
我發現愛人和多年前的氣色差好多
我帶著他去醫院看診
醫生單獨把我留在診間
告訴我愛人病情急速惡化
在不久後即將離世...
多年後，經歷了無數次的選擇...
